description: Every character born on Leonoria is touched (or not) by one of the Ten Mothers — divine forces that shaped the world after The Great Death. 80% of the population carries no sign (The Childless). Those who do carry a sign receive a permanent perk and a conflicting trait. Signs also affect Presence interactions: Light signs distrust Dark signs, neutral signs distrust neither.

presence_interaction_table.description: How signs affect Presence-based social rolls when characters interact.

rules.effect: Presence bonus +5% to all social rolls between them.
Presence penalty -10% to social rolls; Conviction resistance +5% vs dark characters.
Presence bonus +5% to intimidation; -5% to diplomacy.
As above, reversed. Dark characters emit -5% Conviction drain aura near Light characters.
No special interaction. Materium signs are balanced.
No perception penalty from any sign. Universally socially neutral.

calendar_assignment.description: The Ten Mothers each govern one month of the Leonorian calendar. If born in that month, character has a 20% chance to carry the sign.

signs.name: The Guardian
signs.symbol: A closed fist raised before a rising sun
signs.description: You are born a leader. Your presence steadies those around you and you instinctively place yourself between danger and your allies.

perk.name: Shield of Torakai
perk.effect: All team members permanently gain +5% resistance to all damage types while this hero is alive and in the team. The hero gains +10% to all Conviction aptitude points.
perk.notes: The resistance bonus does not stack if multiple Guardians are on the same team — only the highest applies.

conflict.name: The Weight of Command
conflict.effect: -5% to Cognition (Erudition) rolls. Leaders rarely have the patience for study. Also, the hero cannot refuse a direct plea for help from a team member without a Conviction roll or taking -5 Resonance.

signs.religion_bonus: If hero's religion matches The Guardian's alignment (Light faiths), +5% Conviction resistance.

signs.name: The Merciful
signs.symbol: An open palm with water flowing from it
signs.description: You are a healer of mind and heart. The light of Amayael flows through you, cleansing corruption and inspiring those who have given up.

perk.name: Divine Cleanse
perk.effect: Once per world turn, the hero can cast Divine Cleanse, removing all active debuffs and curses from one target (including self). The hero also receives +10% bonus to all actions performed in fully lit environments (daylight, magical light, Purelight zones).
perk.notes: Divine Cleanse cannot remove Temporal damage (Aged status) — only Soulkindler class can do that.

conflict.name: Compassion's Burden
conflict.effect: Hero suffers -5% initiative against enemies who are below 25% Vitality — cannot strike decisively when an enemy appears helpless. This can be overridden by a Conviction (Tenacity) roll.

signs.religion_bonus: Bonus amplified to +15% in light environments if hero follows a Vitalism-based faith.

signs.name: The Rebel
signs.symbol: A broken chain above a rising fist
signs.description: Your mind is free and pure. No force of will or binding magic can cage what Ryvora has made wild.

perk.name: Unbound Will
perk.effect: The hero is immune to all negative Conviction buffs — curses, fear, coercion, and conviction drain have no effect. The hero gains +10% bonus to all Cognition (Worldliness / Common) skill rolls. Also, once per battle, on a 10% random chance, the hero takes a free action completely outside initiative order.
perk.notes: The free action trigger is random and cannot be controlled or predicted.

conflict.name: Unchained
conflict.effect: The hero cannot be magically bound, but also cannot be easily sworn to formal agreements. All diplomatic and loyalty-based Resonance rolls suffer -10%. The hero's Openness value is always treated as 1 higher than actual for purposes of vulnerability.

signs.religion_bonus: No structured religion bonus — the Rebel's faith is deeply personal.

signs.name: The Arbiter
signs.symbol: A balanced scale with a sword tip touching the center
signs.description: You are just and your wit is sharp. Valtorin has given you a mind that sees patterns, weaknesses, and truths that others miss.

perk.name: Edge of Reason
perk.effect: The hero naturally learns all Cognition (Erudition / Scholarly) skills 10% faster. All magical damage dealt gains +5% bonus. The hero's Intelligence sub-trait (a fixed modifier affecting general success) is treated as 2 points higher for all skill rolls.
perk.notes: The 10% Erudition learning bonus stacks with class bonuses (Scholar class gets both).

conflict.name: Rigid Judgment
conflict.effect: The hero suffers -5% to all Cognition (Worldliness / Common) rolls — the Arbiter finds street wisdom beneath them. Cannot ignore a detected injustice without a Conviction roll.

signs.religion_bonus: Logic-based or law-based faiths (Revelation, Dominion schools) grant +5% to all Erudition rolls.

signs.name: The Stoic
signs.symbol: A stone pillar standing alone in a storm
signs.description: You are unmoved. Aethun granted you a stillness that no force of will or presence can penetrate.

perk.name: Pillar of Aethun
perk.effect: The hero is immune to all Conviction-affecting effects cast or emitted by others — including Solacium, Verdicium, Darkmind, and all Presence-based social manipulation. The hero also emits a passive aura on the battlefield: all team members gain +5% resilience against mind-affecting effects while the Stoic is alive.
perk.notes: The immunity applies to both negative AND positive Conviction effects from others. A Merciful's Divine Cleanse still works (it removes debuffs, it doesn't affect Conviction directly).

conflict.name: The Wall
conflict.effect: The hero cannot benefit from team morale bonuses (Resonance buffs from allies have no effect). Presence-based Gravitas rolls by this hero are treated as if Openness is always 0 — they can intimidate but never inspire.

signs.religion_bonus: No structured religion bonus — the Stoic's faith is internal silence.

signs.name: The Hedonist
signs.symbol: A cup overflowing with water under a full moon
signs.description: You are one with your body. Zyren blessed you with vitality and an unconscious charm that makes others lower their guard.

perk.name: Zyren's Gift
perk.effect: The hero naturally regenerates HP 10% faster between battles (not in combat). The hero can charm any non-hostile NPC into revealing the location of nearby hidden wealth or loot caches (once per settlement). The hero dodges 10% of all attacks directed at them (always active, no roll needed).
perk.notes: The 10% dodge is passive and stacks with active dodge skills and Agilities.

conflict.name: Pleasure Over Discipline
conflict.effect: The hero's Cognition (Erudition / Scholarly) skills level 15% slower — the body always wins. All Conviction (Resonance / religious) rolls suffer -5%.

signs.religion_bonus: Pleasure-adjacent faiths (Vitalism, Lifewhispering) grant +5% to natural regen.

signs.name: The Tyrant
signs.symbol: A crown embedded with iron spikes
signs.description: You were born a leader, but not through love — through fear. Velthar's mark makes others bend, whether they want to or not.

perk.name: Terror of Velthar
perk.effect: The hero gains +20% to all Conviction aptitude points. Once per battle, the hero can trigger Terror: one target enemy loses their next initiative turn (raw dread). The hero's presence passively emits an aura of dread that causes -5% Conviction in all enemies on the battlefield.
perk.notes: The Conviction aura stacks with other aura effects. Terror cannot be used twice on the same target in one battle.

conflict.name: Feared, Not Loved
conflict.effect: All diplomacy and Presence (Gravitas/magnetism) rolls suffer -15% — people obey out of fear, not respect. The hero cannot benefit from the Merciful's Divine Cleanse on Conviction-related debuffs (Velthar's mark resists divine interference).

signs.religion_bonus: Dominion or Umbramancy faith grants +5% to Terror effect radius.

signs.name: The Predator
signs.symbol: A claw mark across a closed eye
signs.description: You are an opportunistic warrior with keen senses. Xirath made you for the kill — efficient, precise, and without mercy for the weak.

perk.name: Hunt the Weak
perk.effect: The hero gains +10% to all Physiology aptitude points. Once per battle, against any enemy with Conviction below 50, the hero can call Hunt the Weak — the target loses all Conviction points for the duration of that battle. In dark environments (dungeons, Dark Forests, Forgotten Kingdom, night) the hero gains +10% to all Agilities rolls.
perk.notes: Hunt the Weak can only be triggered once per battle and cannot target allies. The Conviction drain is permanent for that battle only.

conflict.name: Predator's Blindspot
conflict.effect: The hero suffers -10% to all Cognition (Erudition / Scholarly) rolls — the hunt, not the book. Also -5% initiative in fully open, brightly lit environments (The Midlands daytime, The Gleam Havens).

signs.religion_bonus: Bestial Communion or Blood Magic faiths grant +5% to Hunt the Weak trigger chance.

signs.name: The Destroyer
signs.description: You are fierce and brute. Zarkhul forged you for war and nothing but. Kindness is a foreign language.

perk.name: Born to War
perk.effect: The hero begins with a minimum skill level of Seasoned (11) in all martial weapon affinities from the very start — no training required. The hero is immune to all binding, rooting, and paralysis effects (nothing holds the Destroyer).
perk.notes: The Seasoned floor means martial skills cannot start below 11, but still level normally above that.

conflict.name: Zarkhul's Curse
conflict.effect: The hero suffers de-buffs in the presence of Light-aligned characters: -5% to all rolls when a Light-sign hero (Guardian, Merciful, Rebel) is in the team. -10% to all Presence (Gravitas) rolls in diplomatic situations — the Destroyer is incapable of pretense.

signs.religion_bonus: Dreadforgering or Blood Magic faiths grant +5% to all physical damage.

signs.name: The Childless
signs.description: Born without a godly mother's touch. The most common sign on Leonoria — 80% of all race members carry no divine mark. Aira's blessing is simply this: everyone is neutral toward you.

perk.name: Aira's Veil
perk.effect: No character or NPC of any sign has a negative Presence-based perception penalty toward a Childless hero. Sign-based social penalties do not apply in either direction. The hero is a social blank slate.
perk.notes: This does not grant social bonuses — it only removes sign-based penalties. A Destroyer-signed enemy still won't like a Childless hero who is kind, but they won't actively dislike them for their sign.

conflict.name: The Unmarked
conflict.effect: No sign-based perks. No divine perk abilities. The hero must rely entirely on class, aptitudes, and training.
conflict.notes: This is not truly a conflict — it is simply the absence of the divine.

signs.religion_bonus: Any religion provides a small +3% bonus to one faith-relevant skill (player's choice at creation).
